flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lewis University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.5k → $39.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lewis University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.5k → $39.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lewis University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Lewis University fell 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($24.2k → $21.5k).
